caption:
Stuck with just eggs and bread? We've all been there! 🙋‍♀️ Transform these humble ingredients into 5 delicious meals that'll save your dinner (and your sanity). No fancy ingredients needed, just pantry magic! ✨

Swipe through for recipes that'll make you the hero of your kitchen. 👑

Want more meal-saving magic? Download Peppera now for hundreds of simple, tasty recipes using what you already have! Link in bio.
hooks: Staring at eggs and bread? Don't panic! 🥚🍞
Your boring eggs & bread are about to get a major glow-up!
When your pantry says 'eggs & bread' but your stomach says 'FEED ME!'
platform_notes: Instagram: Optimize for carousel post. Each slide should be visually engaging with 2D cartoon illustrations. First 3 slides are most critical for engagement. Include call-to-action on last slide directing to download Peppera.

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

slides.image_prompt: A cheerful round red pepper cartoon character with arms, legs, and a friendly face, holding eggs and bread, looking excited, surrounded by question marks, 2D cartoon illustration style
slides.text: 5 AMAZING MEALS FROM JUST EGGS & BREAD!

slides.image_prompt: A worried round red pepper cartoon character with arms, legs, and a friendly face, staring into a nearly empty pantry with only eggs and bread visible, 2D cartoon illustration style
slides.text: When your fridge is bare but your stomach's rumbling...

steps: Beat eggs, milk, sugar, and cinnamon in a bowl
Dip bread slices in mixture, coating both sides
Fry in buttered pan until golden brown on both sides
Serve with syrup or sugar
recipe.proTip: Slightly stale bread works best as it absorbs the egg mixture without falling apart

slides.image_prompt: Cartoon pepper mascot flipping French toast in a pan with a big smile, 2D cartoon illustration style

steps: Cut a hole in the middle of each bread slice
Butter both sides of bread and place in pan
Crack an egg into each hole
Fry until egg is cooked to your liking
recipe.proTip: Use the bread circles to make mini toast soldiers for dipping!

slides.image_prompt: Cartoon pepper mascot cooking an egg-in-a-basket with a satisfied expression, 2D cartoon illustration style

steps: Butter bread and cut into triangles, then layer in dish
Beat eggs, milk, sugar and vanilla together
Pour egg mixture over bread and let soak for 15 mins
Bake at 180°C for 30-35 mins until golden and set
recipe.proTip: Sprinkle with nutmeg or cinnamon before baking for extra flavour

slides.image_prompt: Cartoon pepper mascot proudly presenting a golden bread and butter pudding, 2D cartoon illustration style

steps: Grease a baking dish and layer half the bread cubes
Sprinkle with half the cheese and seasonings
Repeat layers, then beat eggs and milk and pour over
Bake at 180°C for 40-45 mins until set and golden
recipe.proTip: Make this the night before and refrigerate - perfect for breakfast!

slides.image_prompt: Cartoon pepper mascot slicing a golden, bubbly cheese and egg strata with a knife, 2D cartoon illustration style

ingredients: 2 slices of bread, blitzed to crumbs
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, and seasonings in a bowl
Stir in bread crumbs, vegetables and most of cheese
Pour into ovenproof pan and top with remaining cheese
Bake at 200°C for 20 mins until set and golden
recipe.proTip: Bread crumbs make it extra fluffy and help use up slightly stale bread!

slides.image_prompt: Cartoon pepper mascot lifting a perfectly golden frittata from the oven, 2D cartoon illustration style

A cheerful round red pepper cartoon character with arms, legs, and a friendly face, holding a phone with the Peppera app open, surrounded by food icons, giving a thumbs up, 2D cartoon illustration style
slides.text: Download Peppera for 100s more recipes using what you have in your pantry!
